title: croton polytomus
intro: Croton polytomus, also known as the croton or dragontree, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Croton polytomus include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Croton polytomus include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in water or applying them topically to affected areas.
